## Summary

What is broken?

## Area

- [ ] Repository structure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Accessibility guidance
- [ ] Template or workflow
- [ ] GitHub metadata

## Current Behavior

What happens now?

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Evidence

- Broken path, link, or reference
- Confusing or incorrect file
- Other observable issue

## Reproduction Or Location

Which file, folder, or workflow is affected?

## Notes

Add any other relevant context.
